security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Manager for disposable, isolated browsing sessions.
bundle.longDescription: Aegis Private Browser manages disposable and persistent, isolated browsing environments (Gateway VM + Browser VM). Stronger protection can reduce site compatibility.
